settings.title: Musebase Settings
settings.translation.fallback: Switch to free translation (MyMemory) automatically when DeepL fails
settings.translation.fallback.warn: When on, lyrics may be sent to the public free-translation server (MyMemory) if the primary engine fails.
settings.deepl.key.header: DeepL API key (empty = provider translation only)
settings.deepl.lang.header: Translation target language (DeepL target_lang, default: system language)
settings.translation.libre.endpoint: LibreTranslate endpoint (blank = default; self-host for reliability)
settings.sources.hint: Unofficial sources may pose ToS/copyright risks when the project is published. Enable at your discretion.
settings.sources.restart: Lyrics-source changes take effect after restart.
settings.browserDisplay.hint: Show live lyrics in a web browser on a tablet or TV. Turn it on from the tray menu ("Browser display").
settings.browserDisplay.lan: Allow other devices on your LAN to connect
settings.browserDisplay.lan.hint: You may need to allow Musebase through Windows Firewall. Port/LAN changes apply the next time browser display starts.
settings.fontHint:
Text size adjusts automatically to the overlay size.
(Hover the overlay and click the lock → move/resize mode)
settings.hideSameTranslation: Hide translation identical to the original
settings.onlyTargetTranslation: Show only the target-language translation (needs a DeepL key; provider translations, usually Chinese, are hidden)
settings.hideOnMouseOver: Hide overlay on mouse-over (avoid blocking the screen)
settings.telemetry.resetId.done: A new anonymous ID will be used from now on. Previously sent data cannot be linked to it.
telemetry.consent.title: Musebase — Usage statistics
telemetry.consent.intro: Would you like to help improve Musebase by sharing anonymous usage statistics? Nothing is collected unless you opt in. The identifier is a random ID created on this device, and no lyrics text, listening history, or personal data is ever sent.
telemetry.consent.basic: Basic statistics — features, performance, environment. No song information.
telemetry.consent.quality: Quality reports — includes the song title and artist of tracks whose lyrics were not found or that you marked as wrong lyrics.
telemetry.consent.note: Both options are off by default. You can change them anytime in Settings → General.
tray.offset.label: Sync offset: {value}s
browserDisplay.dialog.title: Browser display
browserDisplay.fail:
Could not start the browser display on port {port}.
{error}
update.title: Musebase Update
update.dev:
Auto-update is not available in development builds.
Current version: v{version}
update.latest: You are on the latest version. (v{version})
update.available:
A new version v{version} is available. (current v{current})
Install now and restart?
update.error:
An error occurred while checking for updates.
{error}
about.intro: A desktop lyrics overlay that shows synced lyrics and translations for what you're playing.
about.attribution: Ported from LyricsX and LyricsKit by ddddxxx (MPL-2.0).
mini.title: Musebase
mini.offset.label: {value}s
settings.mini.closeToTray: Hide to tray on close (remove from taskbar)
translate.fail.quota: Translation quota exceeded — pick a free engine or choose LibreTranslate in Settings.
translate.fail.auth: Translation failed: the API key was rejected. Check the key in Settings.
translate.fail.rate: Translation is being rate-limited — it will retry shortly.
translate.fail.server: The translation service returned a server error. Try again later.
translate.fail.network: Could not reach the translation service. Check your connection.
translate.fail.other: Translation failed. See the log for details.
search.title: Search lyrics
search.label.title: Title:
search.col.title: Title
search.status.count: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} (by quality) — select an item to preview
editor.title: Edit lyrics — {track}
editor.lang.label: Language:
editor.hint.simple: Simple view: [mm:ss.xx]original【translation】. Choose a language above. Character-level karaoke (tt) and other-language translations are preserved on save.
editor.hint.full: Full view (lossless): [mm:ss.xx]original · [mm:ss.xx][tr]translation · [mm:ss.xx][tt]karaoke tag. Edit only the original/translation and leave [tt] lines as-is.
editor.invalid: Invalid lyrics format. At least one time-tag ([mm:ss.xx]) line is required.
